function.name: batch_edit_repo_files

message.content:
I addressed all parts of the user's request by refactoring the DataService class in service.ts from callback-based methods to async/await methods returning Promises. I then updated handler.ts to use the new async/await API of DataService with proper async functions and try/catch error handling.

There are no syntax errors or missing imports in the changes. The types import in service.ts was adjusted to remove the Callback type since it's no longer used.

No other related files appear to need updates for consistency given the current repo structure.

Summary:
- Refactored DataService methods (getAll, getById, create, delete) to async/await returning Promises.
- Updated handler functions to async functions using await with try/catch for error handling.

The changes are complete and correct.
